title: Neon Meteor Run
description: A polished local arcade survival run with pulse bursts, shield pickups, combo sparks, and escalating meteor waves.
controls: Arrow keys or WASD to steer
Press Space to trigger a pulse burst
Collect sparks to stack score and survive the full timer
releaseNotes: v1.4.0: Overhauled visuals - particle explosions, screen shake, animated ship thruster, and comet trails on meteors.
v1.3.0: Pulse attacks, shield pickups, local best tracking, and escalating meteor intensity are all live.

title: Skyline Sprint GX
description: A custom neon expressway runner where you weave through traffic, bank boost cells, and try to clear the night route intact.
controls: Use Left and Right or A and D to switch lanes
Hold Up, W, or Space to spend boost charge
Collect energy cells and avoid traffic collisions
releaseNotes: v1.1.0: Visual overhaul - animated city buildings, glowing vehicle details, rain effect, and boost jet trails.
v1.0.0: Original lane runner with boost management and multi-lane traffic pressure.

title: Memory Vault 84
description: A custom cipher-grid puzzle cabinet where you reveal mirrored glyph pairs and chase a lower move count every run.
controls: Click or tap tiles to reveal hidden glyphs
Match two identical symbols to lock a pair
Clear all six pairs in as few moves as possible
releaseNotes: v1.1.0: Visual overhaul - animated flip cards, glyph glow effects, and match celebration particles.
v1.0.0: Original 12-card mirrored vault grid with local best-move tracking.

title: Pixel Breach
description: A neon space shooter where you intercept alien formations, chain laser combos, collect golden shields, and hold the line against escalating enemy waves.
controls: Arrow keys or A and D to move your fighter left and right
Space or Z to fire lasers and hold to auto-fire
Collect golden shields to temporarily protect your hull
releaseNotes: v1.0.0: Brand new original Space Invaders-inspired shooter cabinet.
Features enemy formations, laser chains, shield pickups, explosions, and escalating wave difficulty.
